assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/login with wrong credentials returns 401
assertionResults.title: POST /api/auth/login with wrong credentials returns 401

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns 200 + user info
assertionResults.title: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns 200 + user info

assertionResults.fullName: Landscapes POST /api/landscapes creates a new landscape
assertionResults.title: POST /api/landscapes creates a new landscape

assertionResults.fullName: Landscapes GET /api/landscapes returns the created landscape
assertionResults.title: GET /api/landscapes returns the created landscape

assertionResults.fullName: SIDs POST /api/sids creates a SID with empty name and default DEV type
assertionResults.title: POST /api/sids creates a SID with empty name and default DEV type

assertionResults.fullName: SIDs POST /api/sids creates a SID with PRD type
assertionResults.title: POST /api/sids creates a SID with PRD type

assertionResults.fullName: SIDs POST /api/sids creates a SID with QAS type
assertionResults.title: POST /api/sids creates a SID with QAS type

assertionResults.fullName: System Type Persistence SID with TST type is persisted and returned correctly on GET /api/landscapes
assertionResults.title: SID with TST type is persisted and returned correctly on GET /api/landscapes

assertionResults.fullName: System Type Persistence PUT /api/sids/:id can update system type from DEV to PPRD
assertionResults.title: PUT /api/sids/:id can update system type from DEV to PPRD

assertionResults.fullName: System Type Persistence PUT /api/sids/:id can update system type from PPRD to PRD
assertionResults.title: PUT /api/sids/:id can update system type from PPRD to PRD

assertionResults.fullName: System Type Persistence PUT /api/sids/:id with empty body returns 400
assertionResults.title: PUT /api/sids/:id with empty body returns 400

assertionResults.fullName: Activity Types GET /api/activity-types returns an array
assertionResults.title: GET /api/activity-types returns an array

assertionResults.fullName: Settings GET /api/settings returns the settings object
assertionResults.title: GET /api/settings returns the settings object

assertionResults.fullName: Cleanup / Delete DELETE /api/landscapes/:id removes the landscape
assertionResults.title: DELETE /api/landscapes/:id removes the landscape
